creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
Thank you for your reply.

 It was not only my problem. I saw the same problem on FreeBSD Japanese mailing list.

 I did not set any extra options arround sed or path.
% which sed
/usr/bin/sed
%
running both as root and a user.

 I do not know how the configure find the executables, but it finds /usr/local/bin/sed
on my host... oops, it doesn't now !
I tried many times on my hosts at that time, however, it cannot be reproduced.
Please close this PR.
